title: Atmosphog
description: Subtly improves the fog and sky
body:
Atmosphog --- Subtly improves the fog and sky based on the biome, weather, and time of day. This project was designed for the modpack [Motions & Stuff](https://modrinth.com/modpack/motions-n-stuff), and it was inspired by [fogulous](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fogulous) and [visual effects plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-effects-plus).
**Why _this_ resourcepack?** - The fog's thickness and distance is dynamic, it changes based on the time of day and weather - The colours are much better, but still feel vanilla - It makes the ancient city feel more immersive ---
--- [![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be755599c034fa25058b615f8c2f4af619a398ba.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)
